name: zipzo
description: Hybrid grocery platform for MeroMart company products and MeroDokaan local shop marketplace.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @zipzo/shared && npm run build -w @zipzo/api && npm run build -w @zipzo/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @zipzo/shared && npm run lint -w @zipzo/api && npm run lint -w @zipzo/admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @zipzo/shared && npm run test -w @zipzo/api && npm run test -w @zipzo/admin
